summary: Iteration 34 - Bloco 7 Inspeção Detalhamento Completo VALIDATED. Backend pytest 15/15 PASS for GET /api/inspecoes/{id} returning enriched ativo (sector.nome, fabricante, modelo, numero_serie, tipo_equipamento), os_vinculadas array (with responsavel_nome + status), historico array from audit_logs, all 4 actor names (criado_por_nome, iniciado_por_nome, concluido_por_nome, alterado_por_nome), executantes_nomes map, checklist with conforme/resultado/observacao fields, no _id leaked. Frontend Playwright on concluded inspection 490c00ce-f050-497c-a03e-02d762916b77 (BR-01 BRITADOR DE MANDIBULA, ASTEC, status=concluida, resultado=conforme, 10 checklist items 6 conforme) verified all required data-testids render: inspecao-detail-page, inspecao-dados-gerais (Tipo Mecanica + Frequência Diaria + Tipo Equip BRITADOR + Fabricante ASTEC), inspecao-rastreabilidade (6/6 fields: Criado por Administrador, Data criação, Iniciado por —, Data início, Concluído por Administrador, Data conclusão), inspecao-historico (1 audit entry rendered). Header shows Concluída + Conforme badges. Checklist shows '6 conforme(s)' count + per-item Conforme/Conforme badges + 'Inspeção Conforme' final badge. PhotoUploader (Registro Fotográfico) section renders.

issues: Modelo/Série/Duração fields are conditional and only render if value present; tested ativo BR-01 only had fabricante+tipo_equipamento. Consider showing '—' placeholder for missing fields to make the section feel more complete (LOW priority advisory). Current behavior matches OS detail pattern.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py:764-810 — get_inspecao correctly enriches: ativo (with sector subset), responsavel, rota, os_gerada, os_vinculadas (with responsavel_nome), historico from audit_logs, 4 actor names (criado/iniciado/concluido/alterado), executantes_nomes map. All _id excluded via projection ✓
server.py:783-786 — os_vinculadas query uses projection limiting fields (numero/status/titulo/responsavel_id) — efficient and clean ✓
App.js:3936-4275 — InspecaoDetailPage renders all required sections with correct data-testid attributes and conditional rendering (sections hide when data absent, by design) ✓
App.js:3967-3978 — Dados Gerais grid uses conditional rendering per field (modelo, serie, duracao only if present) — clean UX ✓
App.js:4011-4024 — Rastreabilidade uses 2-col grid with all 6 mandatory fields + optional alteração block — matches OS pattern ✓
App.js:4214-4226 — OS Geradas clickable items navigate to /os/{id} with hover state — UX consistent ✓
App.js:4244-4259 — Histórico has no max-h-48 / overflow constraint — renders all entries naturally ✓
App.js:3961-3962 — Status + resultado badges render side-by-side in header — clear visual hierarchy ✓

Data integrity NOTE: tested inspection 490c00ce has 2 obrigatorio items (Temperatura, Estado correias) with null responses despite status=concluida — concluir endpoint likely was bypassed during seed; not a code issue but worth flagging that historical seed data may have incomplete records (test verifies schema, not historical data integrity)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required sections render correctly; conditional sections hidden by design when data absent)

test_credentials: admin@manutrix.com/admin123 via /api/auth/login (200 access_token). Frontend session uses sessionStorage keys 'manutrix_token' + 'manutrix_user' (NOT 'token'/'user') — important for next testing agents injecting auth.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Reused inspection 490c00ce-f050-497c-a03e-02d762916b77 (concluida, BR-01 BRITADOR DE MANDIBULA, PLANTA-02, ASTEC, 10 checklist items, resultado=conforme).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bloco 7 (Inspeção Detalhamento) fully validated. Frontend auth injection MUST use sessionStorage keys 'manutrix_token' and 'manutrix_user' (App.js:6217-6218). To re-run backend: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration34_inspecao_detalhamento.py -v`. NOTE: inspecao-os-geradas and inspecao-observacoes are CONDITIONAL — hidden when no os_vinculadas/os_gerada_id and no observacoes respectively. This is expected behavior. The tested inspection has os_vinculadas=[] and observacoes=null so these sections are not visible. Schema-level validation in backend tests confirms the keys exist in response. NOTE 2: ativo.modelo and ativo.numero_serie were null for BR-01 — DG section only renders fields with values (conditional). NOTE 3: Checklist data has some null responses for non-boolean items (numerico/opcao) despite status=concluida — historical seed data issue, not code bug.
rca of the issue: N/A — All Bloco 7 requirements implemented correctly. Backend enrichment complete; frontend conditional rendering correct. No bugs found.
